languages.text: "Слушаюсь, Лорд-капитан!" {n}Голос Ведки звенит от воодушевления.{/n} "Мои бойцы завершают последние приготовления перед началом штурма. По вашей команде мы готовы начать операцию!"
"Yes, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawski's voice rings with excitement.{/n} "My soldiers are completing the final preparations before the assault. On your command, we are ready to begin the operation!"
languages.original_text: "Слушаюсь, Лорд-капитан!" {n}Голос Ведки звенит от воодушевления.{/n} "Мои бойцы завершают последние приготовления перед началом штурма. По вашей команде мы готовы начать операцию!"

traits.locale_text: "Yes, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawski's voice rings with excitement.{/n} "My soldiers are completing the final preparations before the assault. On your command, we are ready to begin the operation!"
"Yes, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawski's voice rings with excitement.{/n} "My soldiers are completing the final preparations before the assault. On your command, we are ready to begin the operation!"
"Yes, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawski's voice rings with excitement.{/n} "My soldiers are completing the final preparations before the assault. On your command, we are ready to begin the operation!"

languages.text: 「はい、艦長様！」{n}ダナウスキーの興奮が声にこもる.{/n}「私の兵士たちは、攻撃前の最終準備を完了しています。あなたの命令で、作戦を開始する準備は万端です！」
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawski's voice rings with excitement.{/n} "My soldiers are completing the final preparations before the assault. On your command, we are ready to begin the operation!"

traits.locale_text: 「はい、艦長様！」{n}ダナウスキーの興奮が声にこもる.{/n}「私の兵士たちは、攻撃前の最終準備を完了しています。あなたの命令で、作戦を開始する準備は万端です！」

languages.text: «Sí, Lord Captain!». {n}La voz de Dunawski resuena, emocionada.{/n} «Mis soldados están ultimando los preparativos del asalto. En cuanto dé la orden, comenzaremos la operación!».
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawski's voice rings with excitement.{/n} "My soldiers are completing the final preparations before the assault. On your command, we are ready to begin the operation!"

traits.locale_text: «Sí, Lord Captain!». {n}La voz de Dunawski resuena, emocionada.{/n} «Mis soldados están ultimando los preparativos del asalto. En cuanto dé la orden, comenzaremos la operación!».

languages.text: “是，舰长大人！”{n}杜纳芙斯卡的声音里透着兴奋。{/n}“我的士兵正在做突击前的最后准备。只要您一声令下，我们即刻行动！”
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawski's voice rings with excitement.{/n} "My soldiers are completing the final preparations before the assault. On your command, we are ready to begin the operation!"

traits.locale_text: “是，舰长大人！”{n}杜纳芙斯卡的声音里透着兴奋。{/n}“我的士兵正在做突击前的最后准备。只要您一声令下，我们即刻行动！”

languages.text: "Ja, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawskis Stimme zittert vor Aufregung.{/n} "Meine Soldaten treffen gerade die letzten Vorbereitungen für den Angriff. Auf Euren Befehl sind wir bereit, mit der Operation zu beginnen!"
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawski's voice rings with excitement.{/n} "My soldiers are completing the final preparations before the assault. On your command, we are ready to begin the operation!"

traits.locale_text: "Ja, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawskis Stimme zittert vor Aufregung.{/n} "Meine Soldaten treffen gerade die letzten Vorbereitungen für den Angriff. Auf Euren Befehl sind wir bereit, mit der Operation zu beginnen!"

languages.text: "Evet Lord Kaptan!" {n}Dunawski'nin sesi heyecanla çınlıyor.{/n} "Askerlerim, saldırı öncesi son hazırlıkları tamamlıyor. Emrinizle operasyona başlamaya hazırız!"
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawski's voice rings with excitement.{/n} "My soldiers are completing the final preparations before the assault. On your command, we are ready to begin the operation!"

traits.locale_text: "Evet Lord Kaptan!" {n}Dunawski'nin sesi heyecanla çınlıyor.{/n} "Askerlerim, saldırı öncesi son hazırlıkları tamamlıyor. Emrinizle operasyona başlamaya hazırız!"

languages.text: « Oui, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! », {n}s'exclame Dunawski, la voix remplie d'excitation.{/n} « Mes hommes terminent les derniers préparatifs avant l'assaut. Nous sommes prêts à lancer l'opération dès que vous en donnerez l'ordre ! »
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain!" {n}Dunawski's voice rings with excitement.{/n} "My soldiers are completing the final preparations before the assault. On your command, we are ready to begin the operation!"

traits.locale_text: « Oui, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! », {n}s'exclame Dunawski, la voix remplie d'excitation.{/n} « Mes hommes terminent les derniers préparatifs avant l'assaut. Nous sommes prêts à lancer l'opération dès que vous en donnerez l'ordre ! »
